title: Send An AGV That Is Not In A Task To A Selected Map Square Using Go To
summary: Use the Robot Selection Go-to function in the OptiSweep map view to send an AGV that is not currently in a task to a selected square. The source emphasizes that the user must select an AGV object first; clicking the map background alone does not perform an action.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when an operator needs to reposition an AGV on the map using the Go to function and the AGV is not in a task.
not_for: Do not use this procedure for an AGV that is currently in a task.
Do not use a generic map click by itself as the selection action, because the source states that clicking the map alone does nothing.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Select the AGV on the map, use the Go to function, choose the destination square, and confirm the move.

safety_notes: Only use the Go-to function for an AGV that is not in a task, as stated by the source.
If clicking the map does nothing, verify that an AGV object or other selectable object was selected rather than the map background.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the OptiSweep map screen
Ability to select AGV objects on the map

access_required: Access to the OptiSweep map screen
system_preconditions: The AGV to be moved is not in a task.
The AGV is selectable on the map.

visual_references.description: Training slide describing the Robot Selection Go-to function and the steps: select an AGV, select Go to, select which square you want the AGV to go to, and select Confirm.

steps.title: Select the AGV object on the map
steps.purpose: Ensure the interface is acting on the AGV rather than on the map background.
steps.instruction: On the map, select the AGV object you want to move. Do not click only on an empty area of the map.
steps.expected_result: The AGV is selected as the active object for further actions.
steps.healthy_condition: A selectable AGV object is chosen and the interface is ready for AGV-specific actions.
steps.failure_condition: Nothing happens because only the map background was clicked and no AGV object was selected.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Map-related training slide and nearby explanation that selectable objects include AGVs and cells, and that clicking the map alone does nothing.

stop_or_escalate_if: Clicking the map does nothing after the attempted selection.
The AGV cannot be selected on the map.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: These are the objects that you can select on the map. If you just click on the map, nothing will happen because the map doesn't know if you're trying to select an AGV or a cell.
1. Select an AGV 2. Select Go to 3. Select which square you want the AGV to go to 4. Select Confirm

steps.title: Verify the AGV is not in a task
steps.purpose: Confirm the source-stated condition for using the Go-to function.
steps.instruction: Before continuing, verify that the selected AGV is not in a task.
steps.expected_result: The AGV is confirmed to be eligible for the Go-to function.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGV is not in a task.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV is in a task, so this procedure should not be used.

actions.label: Verify AGV task status
actions.exact_action: Verify the AGV is not in a task before using the Go to function.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Slide statement that an AGV not in a task can be sent to any square.

stop_or_escalate_if: The AGV is currently in a task.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Robot Selection Go-to function. An AGV not in a task can be sent to any square.

steps.title: Select Go to
steps.purpose: Open the AGV repositioning action for the selected AGV.
steps.instruction: From the AGV selection options, select Go to.
steps.expected_result: The Go-to function is selected for the chosen AGV.
steps.healthy_condition: The interface accepts the Go to selection for the selected AGV.
steps.failure_condition: The Go to option is unavailable or the wrong object was selected.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Robot Selection Go-to function slide showing Go to as the second step after selecting an AGV.

stop_or_escalate_if: Go to is not available after selecting the AGV.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: 1. Select an AGV 2. Select Go to 3. Select which square you want the AGV to go to 4. Select Confirm

steps.title: Select the destination square
steps.purpose: Choose the map square where the AGV should be sent.
steps.instruction: Select the square on the map where you want the AGV to go.
steps.expected_result: A destination square is chosen for the AGV.
steps.healthy_condition: The intended square is selected as the AGV destination.
steps.failure_condition: No destination square is selected or the wrong square is chosen.

actions.label: Choose destination square
actions.exact_action: Select which square you want the AGV to go to

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Go-to workflow step indicating selection of the square the AGV should go to.

stop_or_escalate_if: The destination square cannot be selected.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: 1. Select an AGV 2. Select Go to 3. Select which square you want the AGV to go to 4. Select Confirm

steps.title: Confirm the move
steps.purpose: Send the selected AGV to the chosen square.
steps.instruction: Select Confirm to send the AGV to the chosen square.
steps.expected_result: The AGV is sent to the selected square on the map.
steps.healthy_condition: The move is confirmed and the AGV is directed to the chosen square.
steps.failure_condition: The move is not confirmed and the AGV is not sent.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Go-to workflow step showing Confirm as the final action.

stop_or_escalate_if: Confirm does not send the AGV to the selected square.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: 1. Select an AGV 2. Select Go to 3. Select which square you want the AGV to go to 4. Select Confirm

success_criteria: The selected AGV is sent to the chosen square on the map using the Go to function.
The AGV was selected as an object rather than attempting to act on the map background.
healthy_conditions: The AGV is not in a task before the Go-to function is used.
The AGV can be selected on the map.
The Go to option can be selected.
A destination square can be selected.
Confirm sends the AGV to the chosen square.
failure_conditions: Clicking the map does nothing because no AGV object was selected.
The selected AGV is in a task.
The Go to option is unavailable after selection.
The destination square cannot be selected.
Confirm does not send the AGV to the chosen square.
escalation_guidance: If clicking the map does nothing, ensure an AGV object has been selected rather than the map background.
Stop using this procedure if the AGV is in a task, because the source limits the function to an AGV not in a task.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Robot Selection Go-to function slide and nearby explanation about selectable map objects and the four-step Go-to workflow.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: These are the objects that you can select on the map. If you just click on the map, nothing will happen because the map doesn't know if you're trying to select an AGV or a cell.
Robot Selection Go-to function. An AGV not in a task can be sent to any square.
1. Select an AGV 2. Select Go to 3. Select which square you want the AGV to go to 4. Select Confirm

missing_details: The source does not specify how the operator verifies that the AGV is not in a task.
The source does not provide a time estimate for completing the procedure.
The source does not specify whether production stop or LOTO is required.
The source does not provide explicit UI field names beyond Go to and Confirm.
